# Endel: Sono, Relaxar e Foco · Productivity

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:08 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 6, 2026 - Jun 12, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _$igvard_, May 21, 2026, 1/5: "I have been an avid Endel subscriber for quite some time now and have always enjoyed and benefitted from the soundscapes. Up until the last version Endel has been my trusty companion when working on complex tasks - never further away than a simple click on its icon in the Mac menu bar. Now - the rich menu bar has been replaced with a generic menu with 2 options: ”Play” and ”Pause”. And to top it off, neither Play nor Pause works, which forces the user to find the app’s bug-ridden main window (wherever that decided to go hide - it’s quite random…) Long story short: I can’t deal with rubbish such as this. Life is too short. 3 months ago Endel was king, now there are significantly better options out there. Don’t waste your time and money on Endel, have a look at Brain.fm, Noisli or Dark Noise."
            2. _SIR acid_, Jun 12, 2026, 2/5: "Since a while the app is crashing all the time so even if I’ve payed premium subscription I can’t use it anymore. Even if you have paid subscription you are assaulted with selling offers."
            3. _stonecauldron_, Mar 6, 2026, 5/5: "Endel is my go to for focus music and I have been using it for a while now. My only qualm: the macOS app has been lagging behind the iOS version for some time now. The last update was more than 10 months ago. Please consider updating the macOS version more frequently. Having to use the phone when working can be very distracting. Update: the new update just dropped! Thanks!"
